description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The exterior features a mix of light brown and white surfaces, with large windows providing ample natural light. The front includes a garage, a main entryway with double doors, and a landscaped area with shrubs. On one side, there is a spacious patio area with a swimming pool surrounded by low walls and greenery. The rear of the house has a balcony and additional large windows, enhancing the open, airy feel. The overall structure is characterized by straight lines, minimal ornamentation, and a focus on outdoor living spaces.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a garage, and a poolside patio, featuring clean lines and landscaped surroundings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the garage, main entryway with double doors, and landscaped area with shrubs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the covered patio, large windows, and the full extent of the pool area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the pool, low surrounding walls with greenery, and the back facade with large windows and a balcony.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage extension, driveway, and the pool area from a different angle.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with double glass doors, a small overhang, and landscaped steps leading to the entrance
